chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D- 1796 of 2023 ( Abdul Kashif Shaikh vs. P.O Sindh and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Present;- Irshad Ali Shah, J Zulfiqar Ali Sangi, J Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on CMA No.7763/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 13-03-2024 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>>..<<<<<< It is stated by the petitioner by way of instant petition that he was appointed as Chowkidar in Food Department in year 2013, but his ID is not being opened by the respondents, therefore, they be directed to open the same as he may take his salary. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the petitioner was actually appointed as a Chowkidar in Food Department after observance of all the codal formalities and now is not being paid his salary then issue of salary of civil servant relating to terms of service could only be adjudicated in terms of Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 by the Service Tribunal having jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant Constitutional Petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
